name: LNBLOC 10 1*15TAB
description: A blood pressure-lowering medicine used for treating hypertension that works by suppressing blood vessel contraction.
dosage: Doctor-determined; take at fixed times with water.
storageInstructions: Store in a cool and dry place, protected from direct sunlight, moisture and heat.

name: LOSACAR-H TABLET
description: An anti-hypertensive medicine used to manage high blood pressure when it cannot be controlled using only losartan or hydrochlorothiazide alone.
uses: Management of high blood pressure when single agents are ineffective
dosage: Take in the exact dose and duration as recommended by your doctor.
storageInstructions: Store below 30°C protected from light and moisture.

name: LUPIHEME TAB
description: Iron supplement used to treat iron deficiency in adults.
uses: Treatment of iron deficiency in adults
Iron restoration for normal red blood cell levels
dosage: Take as directed by your doctor on an empty stomach for optimal absorption.
storageInstructions: Store in a cool and dry place below 30°C.

name: LYNX 2ML 1*2ML
description: Used for the treatment of serious bacterial infections in cases where other commonly used antibiotics have failed or could not be used due to allergic problems.
uses: Cases where penicillin/other antibiotics failed or caused allergic reactions
storageInstructions: Store under the conditions mentioned on the pack.

name: LYSER DP TAB 1*10
description: A pain-relieving medicine combining diclofenac and serratiopeptidase, designed to alleviate acute pain and associated swelling.
dosage: Take one tablet with water preferably before meals, as directed by your doctor.
storageInstructions: Store below 30°C away from moisture and heat.

name: LYSER-D TAB 1*15
description: A pain-relieving medicine combining diclofenac and serratiopeptidase, designed to alleviate acute pain and associated swelling.
dosage: Take one tablet with water preferably before meals, as directed by your doctor.
storageInstructions: Store below 30°C away from moisture and heat.

name: MACBERY LS SYP 1*100ML
description: A cough and cold preparation in sugar-free formulation.

name: MACBERY SYP
description: A cough and cold preparation in sugar-free formulation.

name: MACBERY JUNIOR
description: A cough and cold preparation in sugar-free formulation for children.

name: MACPOD 100 SYP 1*30ML
description: An antibiotic medicine used for the treatment of bacterial infection of lungs, airways, throat, ears, nose, etc.
storageInstructions: Store at room temperature, protected from direct sunlight, heat and moisture.

name: MAXIRICH CAP
description: Dietary supplement formulated with essential vitamins and minerals to support immunity, energy levels, and overall well-being.
composition: Multivitamin & mineral complex (Vitamins A, B-complex, C, D3, E; Calcium, Zinc, Iodine, etc.)
dosage: One softgel capsule daily with meals, as directed by physician.

name: MAXTRA DROP 1*15ML
description: Used to treat common cold symptoms in children, alleviating runny or stuffy nose and sneezing.
dosage: Should not be used in children under 4 years of age; follow doctor's prescription.

name: MAXTRA SYP 1*60ML
description: Used to treat common cold symptoms in children, alleviating runny or stuffy nose and sneezing.
dosage: Should not be used in children under 4 years of age; follow doctor's prescription.
